sourceSummary.description: Concrete summary of the useful work in PR A.

replacementSummary.description: Concrete summary of the useful work in PR B.

coveredWork.description: Concrete PR A behavior, file concerns, proof, or review points that PR B covers.

uniqueSourceWork.description: Any PR A work that PR B does not cover and still needs separate review.

securityBlocked.description: True when PR A has security-sensitive context and must not be auto-closed.
